case_title: GENE ROLAND VS. IOSSIF ALIEV et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROLAND, GENE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALIEV, IOSSIF THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1319 46TH AVE, #201, S.F. CA. 94122, INCLUDING ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENTS.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROLAND, GENE AS TO DEFENDANT ALIEV, IOSSIF GADZHIYEV, MARAT DOES 1-20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT ALIEV, IOSSIF
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $29.63 FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROLAND, GENE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT AND OF PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROLAND, GENE SERVED APR-03-2003, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-20, INCLUSIVE
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROLAND, GENE ON DEFENDANT ALIEV, IOSSIF GADZHIYEV, MARAT DOES 1-20, INCLUSIVE
ORDER DIRECTING POSTING AND MAILING OF UNLAWFUL DETAINER SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROLAND, GENE SERVED APR-03-2003, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT GADZHIYEV, MARAT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ALIEV, IOSSIF

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSATISFIED; SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY FULLY SATISFIED AS TO PLAINTIFF'S POSSESSION ONLY WITH ACCRUED COST OF $85.00. AS TO DEFENDANT ALIEV, IOSSIF
APPLICATION FOR POST AND MAIL ORDER; MEMO, OF P/A; DECLARATION OF SUSAN PARKINSON; FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROLAND, GENE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROLAND, GENE SERVED APR-03-2003, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT ALIEV, IOSSIF
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT COMPLAINT AS TO DEFT ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT GADZHIYEV, MARAT
DECLARATION OF SUSAN PARKINSON IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROLAND, GENE
